title: Boy Johnny.
content:
"If you'll busk you as a bride
    And make ready,
    It's I will wed you with a ring,
    O fair lady."

    "Shall I busk me as a bride,
    I so bonny,
    For you to wed me with a ring,
    O boy Johnny?"

    "When you've busked you as a bride
    And made ready,
    Who else is there to marry you,
    O fair lady?"

    "I will find my lover out,
    I so bonny,
    And you shall bear my wedding-train,
    O boy Johnny."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Christina Georgina Rossetti, titled "Boy Johnny.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
